title: cyclosorus papilio
intro: Cyclosorus papilio, also known as the Butterfly Shieldfern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus papilio include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, making it a valuable herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
